LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TROY STERMER'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, APPLICATION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND EXPENSES, CLASS REPRESENTATIVE ENHANCEMENT AND INDIVIDUAL SETTLEMENT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE SETTLEMENT IS APPROVED. DISTRIBUTION OF THE SETTLEMENT FUNDS TO THE OVERTIME CLASS MEMBERS AND THE LABOR CODE 212 CLASS MEMBERS IS APPROVED. CLASS COUNSEL ARE AWARDED $112,500 IN ATTORNEYS' FEES AND $8,500 IN COSTS. A $2,500 ENHANCEMENT FEE IS APPROVED FOR PLAINTIFF TROY STERMER AND $5,000 IS APPROVED TO SETTLE MR. STERMER'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIM. $25,000 IS APPROVED TO ROSENTHAL TO COVER THE COSTS OF DISTRIBUTION. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED AND FILED THIS DATE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
ORDER GRANTING FINAL APPROVAL OF SETTLEMENT CLASS ACTION
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
